TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kasuga_go, title = Kasuga_go, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kasuga_go} }

S.FORM: Haruhi go mki sku Heto Keng. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 155.55 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 67.65 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 84.62 km²), 4,802 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,357 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 4,590 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 96%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Paywan ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Haruhi go ays psgayun 6 ru 6 alang. 6 alang hani ga, Lalekeleke , Kasuga , Seveng , Tjuvecekadan , Kuabar , Kinayiman .

Haruhi go mki sku Heto Keng. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 155.55 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 67.65 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 84.62 km²), 4,802 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,357 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 4,590 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 96%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Paywan ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Haruhi go ays psgayun 6 ru 6 alang. 6 alang hani ga, Lalekeleke , Kasuga , Seveng , Tjuvecekadan , Kuabar , Kinayiman .
S.PHON: ħaruħi ɣo mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*), *,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na pajwan ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu ħaruħi ɣo ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun * ru * alaŋ. * alaŋ ħani ɣa, lalekeleke , kas~ɕuɣa , s~ɕe*eŋ , tju*eʦ~ʨeka*an , kuaβar , kinajiman .
